positive: A stylized, intricate depiction of a lunar crescent cradled by a flowing, nebula-infused wave. The wave should exhibit bioluminescent elements and subtle galactic dust trails, rendered in deep sapphire, cosmic indigo, and vibrant electric cyan. The lunar crescent should have sharp, polished edges, contrasted against the soft, ethereal glow of the surrounding nebula. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment apparel. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau celestial etching meets psychedelic watercolor. High contrast, sharp lines, clean silhouettes, vector graphic quality. Lighting: Deep space luminescence, moody yet vibrant. Print-friendly details: Minimal gradient falloff, solid color blocking areas are key.
negative: blur, artifact, watermarks, logos, text, dirty, lowres, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cropped, grayscale, monochrome, extra limbs, mutated, copyright, jpeg artifacts, noise, grain, smudge
